# Second Vertical Derivative

**Summary**: A derivative filter used to enhance near-surface anomalies by highlighting high-frequency changes in the gravity field.

---

## How It Is Used in the Thesis Collection

- [[2018-hanif|Hanif, 2018]] applied second-vertical-derivative to the residual gravity map to define fault edges and types.

## Typical Workflow



## Key Results and Findings

- The SVD analysis confirmed that most faults were thrust faults based on the comparison of maximum and minimum values. ([[2018-hanif|Hanif, 2018, p. 66]])
